entities.name: shallow metrics
entities.context: A metric-driven approach to products that the referenced companies are skeptical of; viewed as insufficient for measuring true value

entities.name: ad-driven models
entities.context: Advertising-based business/revenue models that the referenced companies are skeptical of; seen as misaligned with user value

entities.name: career building
entities.context: A human-centered approach to professional development that the referenced companies are actively exploring as an alternative to shallow metrics

entities.name: professional connection
entities.context: Richer, more meaningful networking approaches the referenced companies are exploring; distinct from transactional professional networking

relationships.context: Both are approaches that prioritize surface-level engagement over depth; mentioned together as things to be skeptical of
Two complementary domains explored together as part of a richer, more human approach to professional life
